backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the energy dashboard backend with user profile management, yearly prices/taxes, meter readings, and cost calculation endpoints, protected by role-based access control.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that strips per-month price/tax override fields from old Entry records, converting them to the new simplified NewEntry schema while preserving all other user data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features (cost calculation fixes and usage analysis view) to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files describing each component's purpose, recent changes, and styling approach for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Energie Dashboard Jos' that mounts the React app at the root div and loads the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication state, year selection, and a tabbed layout with Grafieken, Analyse, Gegevensinvoer, and Vergelijking tabs, each receiving the selected year.
frontend/src/components/ComparisonView.t: Year-over-year comparison component that fetches monthly consumption for two user-selected years and computes gas/electricity costs frontend-side using stored yearly prices and tax rates, displaying results in a table and bar chart.
frontend/src/components/ConsumptionChart: Renders a monthly bar chart of gas and electricity consumption for a given year, fetching meter entry data and calculating consumption via the backend actor.
frontend/src/components/CostChart.tsx: Renders a monthly line chart of gas, electricity, and other costs for a given year, computing costs from consumption data and stored yearly prices.
frontend/src/components/EntryForm.tsx: Form component for adding or editing monthly meter readings (gas, electricity, other costs), with a live consumption preview based on the previous month's readings.
frontend/src/components/EntryList.tsx: Displays a sortable table of all meter reading entries with per-row consumption deltas, and supports editing and deleting individual entries.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header showing an editable dashboard name, the user's short principal ID, and a logout button using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Full-screen login page that prompts the user to authenticate via Internet Identity, with branding, feature hints, and a loading state during login.
Displays a yearly KPI summary (gas cost, electricity cost, taxes, total) by fetching all entries and computing monthly consumption via the backend actor. Shows skeleton loaders while loading and an empty-state message if no data exists for the selected year.
frontend/src/components/UsageAnalysisVie: Renders a monthly usage analysis table and KPI cards for gas and electricity consumption for a given year, fetching per-month consumption from the backend actor and aggregating totals.
Allows users to set and save per-year energy prices (gas €/m³ and electricity €/kWh), pre-filling with stored values or Dutch market defaults, and persisting via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/YearlyTaxCard.ts: Allows users to configure per-year Dutch energy tax rates (energiebelasting incl. BTW) for gas and electricity, defaulting to 2025 statutory rates and saving via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/YearSettingsCard: Provides a settings card for configuring yearly starting meter readings and global meter readings, pre-filling inputs from backend data and saving changes via mutation hooks with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches a backend actor instance using React Query, initializing it with the user's Internet Identity or anonymously, and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for all backend actor interactions including CRUD for entries, user profiles, consumption calculations, and dashboard name management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind, imports Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, and defines a dark navy energy-themed design system using OKLCH CSS variables for colors, gradients, and glow effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based design tokens, custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, and energy-specific color scales (gas/elec), plus typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the Dutch energy meter tracking app, its existing features, and two pending action requests: fixing broken cost calculations and adding a usage analysis view.
